nasb.text: The one who released the goat as the scapegoat shall wash his clothes and bathe his body with water; then afterward he shall come into the camp.

esv.text: And he who lets the goat go to Azazel shall wash his clothes and bathe his body in water, and afterward he may come into the camp.

cnv.text: 那送走歸阿撒瀉勒的山羊的人，要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗身，然後才可以進到營裡。

ccb.text: 把羊送交阿撒泻勒的人要洗衣、沐浴，然后才可回到营里。
